title: Command Cockpit Node Echo Rail
summary: Projected selected-node path history, blocker, and next-action signals directly inside the Command Cockpit Quest board.
changes: Adds reusable role-aware Quest node echoes for realm, level, checkpoint, gate, and next-action states.
Renders a four-chip animated echo rail inside the Quest board so clicked nodes reveal richer path context without adding vertical layout.
Compresses the echo rail for cockpit and mobile views so the board remains first-screen friendly.
